case_title: DENISE KEMP VS. TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.00 - SERVED MAR-13-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-12-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-12-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY CARLOS DAVID MORAN JR.--SUPP. HOUSING MGR.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2013 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY KEMP, DENISE AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-12-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KEMP, DENISE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC "THE TWO YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS BARS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM" PER JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
